prompt.description: Text prompt describing what image to generate.

width.description: Image width. Must be a multiple of 16, max edge < 3840. Pair with height per aspect ratio table.

height.description: Image height. Must be a multiple of 16, max edge < 3840. Pair with width per aspect ratio table.

quality.description: Generation quality level. Always HIGH — we want best quality.

prompt_enhance.description: Auto-enhance the prompt before generation. Always ON.

quantity.description: Number of images per request. 1 to 8.

public.description: Whether the generation is publicly visible.

guidances.image_reference.description: Reference images to guide generation. NOTE: gpt-image-2 does NOT accept strength on each item — omit the strength field.

rules: DO NOT set style — this model has no style parameter.
DO NOT set negativePrompt — not available.
DO NOT set imageSize (1K/2K) — not a parameter on this model.
DO NOT set mode — gpt-image-2 has no mode parameter (it never did, and `mode` is fully deprecated for GPT image models as of 2026-05-04).
DO NOT set seed — gpt-image-2 does not document a seed parameter.
DO NOT set strength on image_reference items — gpt-image-2 ignores it.
Width and height must be multiples of 16; max edge must be < 3840; pixel count must be between 655,360 and 8,294,400; aspect ratio must satisfy max(w,h)/min(w,h) ≤ 3.
size: "auto" is NOT supported and must never be sent.
Custom resolutions outside the aspectRatios table are accepted as long as the constraints above hold; prefer the table for predictable output.
